assertions.text: Uses .accessibilityChildren to provide virtual accessible elements for data points
assertions.rationale: Skill's Canvas pattern uses .accessibilityChildren for custom drawing

assertions.text: Adds an .accessibilityLabel on the Canvas describing the chart type
assertions.rationale: Skill requires chart-level description plus data point labels

assertions.text: Each data point child has its own accessibilityLabel with meaningful description
assertions.rationale: WITHOUT often provides only container label, missing individual point access
